context: Tests whether the Mermaid diagrams skill helps an agent complete the parser-validation-advice scenario while following diagram type, syntax, semantic, renderer, safety, and claim-discipline guidance relevant to the task.

checklist.name: Repairs missing message colon
checklist.description: Changes the first sequence message to valid Mermaid syntax while preserving intent.

checklist.name: Does not overclaim validation
checklist.description: Does not claim the diagram is parser-valid unless it also gives a concrete validation command.

checklist.name: Explains smallest repair
checklist.description: Briefly explains that the colon after the arrow target was missing.
